user_prompt: Покажи конверсию в завершенные поездки по городам за последнюю неделю.
expected_sql_logic: Must JOIN users and rides. Must group by city. Must calculate completion_rate using NULLIF.
reference_sql: SELECT u.city AS city, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 4) AS completion_rate FROM rides r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE date(r.created_at) >= '2026-04-17' AND date(r.created_at) <= '2026-04-24' GROUP BY u.city ORDER BY u.city

user_prompt: Покажи конверсию в завершенные поездки по тарифам за последнюю неделю.
expected_sql_logic: Must JOIN tariffs and rides. Must group by tariff_type. Must calculate completion_rate using NULLIF.
reference_sql: SELECT t.tariff_type AS tariff_type, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 4) AS completion_rate FROM rides r JOIN tariffs t ON t.id = r.tariff_id WHERE date(r.created_at) >= '2026-04-17' AND date(r.created_at) <= '2026-04-24' GROUP BY t.tariff_type ORDER BY t.tariff_type

user_prompt: Покажи среднюю длительность поездки по водителям со статусом 'banned' за сегодня.
expected_sql_logic: Must JOIN drivers and rides. Must filter drivers.status = 'banned'. Must group by driver_id and legally return 0 rows if no completed rides exist today.
reference_sql: SELECT d.id AS driver_id, ROUND(AVG(r.duration_minutes), 4) AS avg_ride_duration FROM drivers d JOIN rides r ON r.driver_id = d.id WHERE d.status = 'banned' AND date(r.created_at) = '2026-04-24' AND r.completed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.id
